checkpoints.action: Implement score-update.sh accepting --agent, --event, --note args; reads and writes ~/.claude/agent-scores.json
Implement score-inject.sh to output score injection text block; mount at commands/dev.md BA/Dev/QA dispatch steps and commands/close.md CLOSE:YES branch
Implement test-writer agent: generate pytest+Playwright test skeleton from Executable AC JSON to tests/generated/<task_id>/test_AC*.py + manifest.json (UPDATE vs CREATE based on ac_uid hash)
Implement TDAD Blast Radius Tool using Python ast module + grep; produce blast-radius-map.json in dev-registry/<task_id>/ with confidence-tagged edges
Let test-writer skeleton tests pass: fill pytest.fail() expected values only; do not modify assertion logic; declare coverage_gap handling in dev report
Implement Cache-Safe Canary as SessionStart hook in settings.json; register with exec >/dev/null on success, stderr+exit 2 on failure
Fix session-info.sh and session-git-init.sh stdout outputs to use stderr; unify LINE_LIMIT between pretool-read-size-guard.py (1000) and CLAUDE.md (600)
Add failures[].primary_cause enum field to qa.md Output JSON (dev_error|ba_error|environment|unknown) for scoring attribution
Update dev.md Step 12.0 to call score-update.sh after QA completes; update Step 15 completion report to include score change summary
Update close.md CLOSE:YES branch to call AskUserQuestion 1-5 star (with skip option) then score-update.sh with user rating event
